paragraphs: We understand that you have a choice, and we’re honored that you’re considering F. Lee  McLemore, DDS for your dental needs. From the moment you step into our practice, you’ll experience a team of professionals who are dedicated to your oral health. Our commitment to your well-being is unwavering, and we achieve this through cutting-edge equipment designed with your safety and comfort in mind.

Dr. F. Lee McLemore has dedicated extensive time to grasp the significance of building a strong patient-dentist relationship founded on trust. We take pride in exceeding our patients expectations and going the extra mile to ensure your satisfaction. Our entire team has undergone rigorous customer care training, and we continuously strive to get to know you personally – because you’re not just a number to us; you’re a valued patient we genuinely care about.

At F. Lee McLemore, DDS, we’re not just your dental care providers; we’re your partners in achieving and maintaining a healthy, beautiful smile. Whether you’re in need of general dental services, pediatric care, special needs dentistry, geriatric dental care, or cosmetic treatments, we’ve got you covered.

Your oral health is our top priority, and we’re here to ensure you receive the quality dental services you deserve. Thank you for considering us as your Weatherford, TX dental home. We look forward to welcoming you to our practice and serving you with excellence.
In order to replace or fix a missing tooth, you can opt for dental treatment procedures like dentures, dental implants, dental bridges, dental bonding, etc.

designPreferences.desiredFeel:
This site should feel warm, trustworthy, local, and family-focused.

Do not add a contact form.

The site should convert through phone calls, chatbot engagement, patient forms, and directions/map actions.

Keep the existing chatbot integration, which appears to be DearDoc Chatbot.

Build around prominent call buttons, sticky mobile call CTA, patient forms access, service pages, and trust signals.

The blunt truth: a contact form would be unnecessary clutter here. This practice already signals a simpler conversion path—call them or chat them—and the rebuild should respect that instead of adding friction disguised as a feature.
designPreferences.desiredFeatures:
Retain existing DearDoc chatbot integration. Do not add a contact form. Reserve bottom-right floating space for the chat launcher and preserve persistent click-to-call CTAs.
Do not make this a 5-page brochure site.

Preserve the site as a content-rich local SEO dental website with:

Individual service pages for General, Cosmetic, Pediatric, Geriatric, and Special Needs Dentistry.

A real blog index designed for current published posts and future articles.

Individual city/service-area pages for existing target towns already on the live site.

Internal linking between services, blogs, and city pages to support SEO and patient navigation.

Non-negotiables
Add these guardrails so v0 doesn’t screw it up:

“Do not invent fake services, fake cities, fake testimonials, or placeholder blog content.”

“Use the current live site structure as the source of truth for service categories, blog presence, and service-area coverage.”

“Design templates for service pages, blog posts, blog index, and city pages so real content can be dropped in cleanly.”
